title: Lord, Thou hast made Thyself to me
firstLine: Lord, Thou hast made Thyself to me
tuneAttribution: Tune: Henri Frederick Hemy (1818–1888), James George Walton (1821–1905).
publicDomainBasis: Charlotte Elliott (1789–1871), Henri Frederick Hemy (1818–1888), James George Walton (1821–1905). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Lord, Thou hast made Thyself to me
A living, bright reality,
More present to faith’s vision keen
Than any earthly object seen;
More dear, more intimately nigh
Than e’en the closest earthly tie.

sections.label: Verse 2
Verse 3
